default.author: Mark Edwards
default.title: This is the best white t-shirt out there
default.body: I've searched my entire life for a t-shirt that reflects every color in the visible spectrum. Incredible!

default.author: Blake Reid
default.title: Adds the perfect variety to my wardrobe
default.body: I used to be one of those unbearable minimalists who only wore the same black v-necks every day.

default.author: Ben Russel
default.title: All good things come in 6-Packs
default.body: Tasty beverages, strong abs that will never be seen, and these Basic Tees!
